# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma or newline separated artifact URLs (S3/Artifactory/HTTP/HTTPS)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAMES', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional comma or newline separated target filenames matching ARTIFACT_URLS order')
        string(name: 'PROD_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma or newline separated production servers (hostnames or user@host)')
        string(name: 'REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/app/deploy', description: 'Remote deployment directory')
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service to restart on remote servers')
        credentials(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'SSH credentials ID for production servers', required: true)
        credentials(name: 'HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional credentials ID for HTTP/Artifactory basic auth', required: false)
        credentials(name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional AWS credentials ID for S3 downloads', required: false)
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEAN_REMOTE_DIR', defaultValue: false, description: 'Clean remote deploy directory before upload')
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deployment')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloads"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def splitValues = { String raw ->
                        if (!raw) {
                            return []
                        }
                        return raw
                            .split(/[\r\n,]+/)
                            .collect { it.trim() }
                            .findAll { it }
                    }

                    def urls = splitValues(params.ARTIFACT_URLS)
                    def names = splitValues(params.ARTIFACT_NAMES)
                    def servers = splitValues(params.PROD_SERVERS)

                    if (urls.isEmpty()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URLS is required')
                    }
                    if (servers.isEmpty()) {
                        error('PROD_SERVERS is required')
                    }
                    if (names && names.size() != urls.size()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_NAMES count (${names.size()}) must match ARTIFACT_URLS count (${urls.size()})")
                    }

                    urls.each { url ->
                        if (!(url ==~ /^(https?|s3):\/\/.+/)) {
                            error("Unsupported URL scheme for artifact: ${url}")
                        }
                    }

                    env.PARSED_URLS = urls.join('\n')
                    env.PARSED_NAMES = names.join('\n')
                    env.PARSED_SERVERS = servers.join('\n')
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    rm -rf "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
                    mkdir -p "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.PARSED_URLS.split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }
                    def names = env.PARSED_NAMES ? env.PARSED_NAMES.split('\n').findAll { true } : []

                    def artifactPlan = urls.withIndex().collect { url, idx ->
                        def explicitName = (names && idx < names.size()) ? names[idx]?.trim() : ''
                        def derivedName = explicitName ?: url.tokenize('/').last().tokenize('?').first()
                        if (!derivedName) {
                            derivedName = "artifact-${idx + 1}"
                        }
                        [url: url, name: derivedName]
                    }

                    writeFile file: "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact-plan.json",
                        text: groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(artifactPlan))

                    def httpCredId = params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()
                    def awsCredId = params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()

                    artifactPlan.each { artifact ->
                        if (artifact.url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                            if (!awsCredId) {
                                error("AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID is required for S3 artifact: ${artifact.url}")
                            }
                            withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: awsCredId]]) {
                                sh """
                                    set -e
                                    aws s3 cp '${artifact.url}' '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${artifact.name}'
                                """
                            }
                        } else if (artifact.url.startsWith('http://') || artifact.url.startsWith('https://')) {
                            if (httpCredId) {
                                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: httpCredId, usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER', passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS')]) {
                                    sh """
                                        set -e
                                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -u "$HTTP_USER:$HTTP_PASS" '${artifact.url}' -o '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${artifact.name}'
                                    """
                                }
                            } else {
                                sh """
                                    set -e
                                    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 '${artifact.url}' -o '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${artifact.name}'
                                """
                            }
                        } else {
                            error("Unsupported artifact URL: ${artifact.url}")
                        }
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -e
                        ls -lah '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy To Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.PARSED_SERVERS.split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'mkdir -p "${params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR}"'
                            """

                            if (params.CLEAN_REMOTE_DIR) {
                                sh """
                                    set -e
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'find "${params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR}" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} +'
                                """
                            }

                            sh """
                                set -e
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}'/* '${server}':'${params.REMOTE_DEPLOY_DIR}/'
                            """

                            if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
                                sh """
                                    set -e
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"; else systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"; fi'
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo systemctl is-active "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"; else systemctl is-active "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"; fi'
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully.'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed.'
        }
        always {
            archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'artifact-plan.json, downloads/*', fingerprint: true, allowEmptyArchive: true
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
        }
    }
}
